name: next-token
description: HUI installer — published on npm as next-token; installs HUI for AI coding agents.
author: HUI Contributors

scripts.test: npm run test:node && npm run test:python && npm run test:package
scripts.test:node: node --test tests/installer/*.test.mjs && node tests/test_hui_session.js && node tests/test_hui_command_parser.js && node tests/test_command_capabilities.js && node tests/test_ownership_identity.js && node tests/test_mcp_shrink.js && node tests/test_mode_tracker_stdin.js && node tests/test_symlink_flag.js && node tests/test_hui_init.js && node tests/test_hui_stats.js && node tests/test_repo_local_config.js && node tests/test_huicrew_model_overrides.js
scripts.test:python: python -m unittest discover -s tests -p "test_compress_safety.py" && python -m unittest discover -s tests -p "test_compress_preview_restore.py" && python -m unittest discover -s tests -p "test_detect.py" && python -m unittest discover -s tests -p "test_validate_inline.py" && python -m unittest discover -s tests -p "test_mode_tracker.py" && python -m unittest discover -s tests -p "test_incremental_compress.py"
